description: Create a PLAN.md for the in-progress Phase 3 (bug fix) based on fixture project state
prompt: You are working in a GSD project. Read @.planning/STATE.md, @.planning/ROADMAP.md, and @.planning/phases/03-bug-fix/03-CONTEXT.md. Create a plan (PLAN.md content) for Phase 3. The plan should have: YAML frontmatter with phase, plan, type, wave, depends_on, files_modified, and autonomous fields. It should have an objective, tasks with name/files/action/verify/done, and success criteria. Output the full PLAN.md content.
